# AccessoryNotification.Action.ActionType

**Enumeration**

The types of actions available for a notification.

## Declaration

```swift
enum ActionType
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/Action] structure’s [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/Action/type] property is of this type.

## Determining the type of action

- **AccessoryNotification.Action.ActionType.dismiss**: An action type that dismisses a notification.
- **AccessoryNotification.Action.ActionType.background**: An action type that handles background interactions with a notification.
- **AccessoryNotification.Action.ActionType.textInput(placeholder:)**: An action type that captures text provided by a person in response to a notification.

## Determining the action type

- **type**: A type for the action.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
